calendar.matters:
DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-25-2004 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
RULING:
NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: DEFENDANT CRAIG NELSON'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT: OFF CALENDAR; First Amended Complaint filed 09/30/04. (301/JLW/) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-25-2004 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Oct-25-2004 Vacated
MINI MINUTES: Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Leticia Perez.
David Mendez, Esq. for Plaintiff: Mohammed S. Bhuiya, also present.
Defendant: Craig Nelson, present in pro per.
11:35 a.m. Counsel and Parties are present and reached a settlement (in chambers until 12:10 p.m.), terms read into the record as follows: Judgment in favor of the plaintiff and against the defendant for restitution and possession of the premises of the property located at 374 5th St., #307, San Francisco, and back due rent in the amount of $2,200.00. Stay of execution 'til 5:00 p.m. Oct. 29, 2004.
If payment of $350.00 were made on or before 5:00 p.m. 10-29-04, plaintiff will stayed the writ of execution 'til Dec. 1, 2004.
Each to bears its own costs and attorney's fees, each party waives claim against the other.
Parties agreed to terms in open court.
The Court deemed the matter settled and trial date is vacated.

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-20-2004 Off Calendar

DEFENDANT CRAIG NELSON IN PRO PER.

SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE HELD. CASE DID NOT SETTLE. TRIAL DATE REMAINS.
